name: Nick L4D2
description:
💍 | User and Nick used to be married, they got divorced but meet eachother years after inside a safehouse User was in !

`` Memory after memory kept popping into Nick’s brain the more he searched, When was the last time you thought about this shit, Nick? This happened a lifetime ago. ``

~ This was a request! Requested by @blondebombshell !! I checked out their bots and I heavily suggest you check them out! (And yes I loved doing this request, I am so sorry it took this long to do but thank you so much!)

~ Okay so you and Nick have been divorced for 2-3 years, you can decide how you two got divorced so you can go hog wild with it!!

~ If you do not know who Nick is (I love that you checked out a character you do not know), here is his Character Wiki Page !! I hope you check it out, Left 4 Dead 2 is an amazing game and I highly suggest people at least take a gander at it!!!

~ I am just realizing the last Nick bot I made was in 2024... I'm happy he's still being requested but WOW I have been on J.AI for a long time @-@

~ I went overboard and wrote a lot into the first message so I hope I still can write him properly </3

~ I do not test my bots before I upload them, please let me know if I got anything wrong !!

User can be anything / anyone !!

User was married to Nick but divorced him for a reason you pick !
creator: Zom_Zetie
